examples: He had been in a drunken street brawl.
Leave the lady alone, you drunken oaf!
The pain roused him from his drunken stupor.
Today, drunken driving claims about 10, 000 lives a year, down from more than 18, 000 in 1982.
His first major success was the drunken lament J'ai Bu, sung by Charles Ulmer.
